title: hazunta coffeoides
side_effects: Hazunta coffeoides can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness due to its high caffeine content. In excessive consumption, it may also lead to insomnia, anxiety, and an increased heart rate. Prolonged use of the plant's extracts can cause stomach ulcers, kidney damage, and liver inflammation. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, exacerbating conditions like high blood pressure and heart disease.
